meta.name: MLQ Meaning in Life Questionnaire
meta.description: The MLQ is a 10-item scale measuring two dimensions of meaning in life: Presence (currently felt meaning) and Search (actively seeking meaning).
meta.author: Steger et al. (2006)
meta.reference: Steger MF, et al. The Meaning in Life Questionnaire: Assessing the presence of and search for meaning in life. Journal of Counseling Psychology. 2006;53(1):80-93.
meta.instruction: Please rate how true each statement is for you.

questions.text: I am looking for something that makes my life feel meaningful
I am always looking to find my life's purpose
My life has a clear sense of purpose
I have a good sense of what makes my life meaningful
I have discovered a satisfying life purpose
I am always searching for something that makes my life feel significant
I am seeking a purpose or mission for my life
My life has no clear purpose
I am searching for meaning in my life

ranges.label: Low Meaning in Life
ranges.description: Your overall meaning in life score is low, suggesting limited perceived purpose and relatively little active exploration of meaning. This pattern may be associated with feelings of emptiness or disengagement.
suggestions: Begin exploring your personal values by reflecting on activities and relationships that have felt most meaningful to you in the past
Engage in volunteering, community service, or helping others, as prosocial behavior is strongly linked to increased sense of purpose
Share your thoughts and feelings with trusted friends, family members, or a counselor to gain new perspectives on your life direction
Try journaling about moments when you feel most alive and engaged, as these can reveal sources of latent meaning

ranges.label: Moderate Meaning in Life
ranges.description: You have a moderate sense of meaning in life and are somewhat engaged in exploring your purpose. Some areas of your life likely feel meaningful while others may still be developing or uncertain.
suggestions: Continue exploring what matters most to you by trying new activities, deepening existing interests, and reflecting on your core values
Create a personal mission statement or list of life priorities to clarify and strengthen your sense of direction
Set specific goals that align with your identified values, and track your progress toward achieving them over time

ranges.label: High Meaning in Life
ranges.description: You have a strong sense of meaning and purpose in your life. You clearly understand what matters to you and are actively living in alignment with your values and goals.
suggestions: Continue living intentionally and nurturing the relationships, activities, and commitments that give your life meaning
Consider mentoring or supporting others in discovering their own sense of purpose, as sharing wisdom deepens personal meaning
Remain open to growth and new experiences, as meaning can evolve and deepen through life transitions and fresh challenges

presence.label: Low Presence
presence.description: You currently experience little felt sense of meaning in your life. Daily activities may feel purposeless or disconnected from your deeper values and aspirations.

presence.label: Moderate Presence
presence.description: You have a moderate sense of meaning in your life. You sometimes feel purposeful and connected to what matters, but this experience may be inconsistent across situations.

presence.label: High Presence
presence.description: You clearly and consistently feel that your life is meaningful. You have a strong sense of purpose that provides direction and satisfaction in your daily experience.

search.label: Low Search
search.description: You are not actively searching for meaning in your life. This may reflect contentment with your current sense of purpose or a lack of motivation to explore existential questions.

search.label: Moderate Search
search.description: You are moderately engaged in exploring the meaning of your life. You occasionally reflect on purpose and direction, balancing curiosity with acceptance of your current situation.

search.label: High Search
search.description: You are actively and intensely searching for meaning and purpose in your life. This strong drive to explore existential questions may reflect a transitional period or deep philosophical engagement.
